test-case.description: exposes Preset as the cleanup selection parameter
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.exposes Preset as the cleanup selection parameter

test-case.description: exposes the upgraded backup job planning parameters
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.exposes the upgraded backup job planning parameters

test-case.description: uses only parameters supported by Get-CleanupRule
test-case.name: RenderKit backup command contracts.uses only parameters supported by Get-CleanupRule

test-case.description: queues a background BackupProject job with chunking and storage tiers
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.queues a background BackupProject job with chunking and storage tiers

test-case.description: analyzes project media files without requiring ffprobe
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.analyzes project media files without requiring ffprobe

test-case.description: plans resumable time-range chunks for timed media
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.plans resumable time-range chunks for timed media

test-case.description: snaps chunk boundaries to nearby keyframes when available
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.snaps chunk boundaries to nearby keyframes when available

test-case.description: builds ffmpeg encode and merge plans for chunked assets
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.builds ffmpeg encode and merge plans for chunked assets

test-case.description: plans scheduler lanes for controlled main video and parallel secondary media
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.plans scheduler lanes for controlled main video and parallel secondary media

test-case.description: validates merged assets for container, streams, and sync drift
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.validates merged assets for container, streams, and sync drift

test-case.description: maps codec and GPU selections to concrete ffmpeg encoders
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.maps codec and GPU selections to concrete ffmpeg encoders

test-case.description: parses ffmpeg progress lines into percentages
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.parses ffmpeg progress lines into percentages

test-case.description: builds structured progress snapshots with speed and ETA
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.builds structured progress snapshots with speed and ETA

test-case.description: runs the BackupProject worker handler when no encoding is required
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.runs the BackupProject worker handler when no encoding is required

test-case.description: creates a v2 backup manifest with pipeline metadata
test-case.name: RenderKit BackupProject job planning.creates a v2 backup manifest with pipeline metadata

test-case.description: creates an empty job store when none exists
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.creates an empty job store when none exists

test-case.description: adds queued jobs
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.adds queued jobs

test-case.description: defines supported job statuses and transitions
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.defines supported job statuses and transitions

test-case.description: filters queued jobs by type
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.filters queued jobs by type

test-case.description: filters job lists by queue and correlation id
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.filters job lists by queue and correlation id

test-case.description: normalizes legacy jobs into the vNext shape
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.normalizes legacy jobs into the vNext shape

test-case.description: starts the oldest queued job
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.starts the oldest queued job

test-case.description: marks jobs as failed with an error message
test-case.name: RenderKit job service.marks jobs as failed with an error message

test-case.description: registers and resolves job handlers
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.registers and resolves job handlers

test-case.description: publishes safe handler catalog metadata without scriptblocks
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.publishes safe handler catalog metadata without scriptblocks

test-case.description: runs a queued job successfully
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.runs a queued job successfully

test-case.description: requeues failed jobs while retry attempts remain
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.requeues failed jobs while retry attempts remain

test-case.description: marks failed jobs after max attempts
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.marks failed jobs after max attempts

test-case.description: starts queued job leases with worker ownership and lease metadata
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.starts queued job leases with worker ownership and lease metadata

test-case.description: renews heartbeats only for the owning worker
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.renews heartbeats only for the owning worker

test-case.description: recovers stale running jobs back to the queue
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.recovers stale running jobs back to the queue

test-case.description: runs a worker tick without double-counting attempts
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.runs a worker tick without double-counting attempts

test-case.description: uses the default lifecycle automation handler
test-case.name: RenderKit job worker service.uses the default lifecycle automation handler
